archimate:DataObject.name: Authorised payment methods metadata
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Definition: Authorised Payment Methods Metadata refers to structured information that provides details about the various payment methods that are accepted and authorized by a system or platform for financial transactions. It includes attributes such as payment method type, supported currencies, transaction limits, authentication requirements, and any additional metadata that helps define the characteristics and specifications of each payment method. Authorised Payment Methods Metadata enables seamless integration and processing of different payment methods, ensuring secure and efficient financial transactions.
Source: OpenAPI Specification (OAS)
Source reference: https://www.openapis.org/
LOST view: SV-Business Agnostic Metadata
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/AuthorisedPaymentMethodsMetadataDataObject
ABB name: egovera:AuthorisedPaymentMethodsMetadataDataObject
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2023-11-20
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/AuthorisedPaymentMethodsMetadataDataObject
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Specialises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DataSetDataObject

properties.value: Authorised Payment Methods Metadata refers to structured information that provides details about the various payment methods that are accepted and authorized by a system or platform for financial transactions. It includes attributes such as payment method type, supported currencies, transaction limits, authentication requirements, and any additional metadata that helps define the characteristics and specifications of each payment method. Authorised Payment Methods Metadata enables seamless integration and processing of different payment methods, ensuring secure and efficient financial transactions.
